title: Tender Smoky American Chicken Skillet
description: A weeknight American dish featuring charred, bouncy chicken, glace cherry, and a smoky flavor, all while being diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chopped glace cherry to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and pepper mixture.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
